title: Herbal Essential Oils for Baldness: 7 Proven Solutions
description: Sesamum indicum essential oil, also known as sesamum oil, has been used for centuries to promote hair growth and combat baldness. This oil is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe the scalp and reduce redness. The oil's active compound, sesamin, stimulates blood flow to the scalp, allowing more nutrients to reach the hair follicles. As a result, hair growth is boosted, and the risk of hair loss is reduced.
